pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 24 to 21 to align with the target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 24 is not available or intended for the target environment; compiling with source/target 24 would fail on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven.compiler.release property to ensure cross-compilation compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without release flag, bytecode might not be strictly compatible with JDK 21 runtime if source/target are used loosely.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the release property and add standard compiler arguments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Old configuration used source/target 17 which is incompatible with the new JDK 21 target and lacks modern compiler flags.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the JpaRepository class.
src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.why_exists: Compilation error: class 'h2.orm.repository.JpaRepository' cannot be found because it has been moved to 'h2.orm.core.repository'.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the JpaRepository interface.
src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.why_exists: Class h2.orm.repository.JpaRepository not found; compilation error due to moved class.
